items.title: Tesla says ‘Robotaxi’ is expanding — its own chart shows it’s not
items.body: Tesla told shareholders this week that its Robotaxi service is expanding. The company’s own chart proves it isn’t. In its Q2 2026 update, Tesla leaned on a cumulative “paid Robotaxi miles” chart climbing past 2.4 million…
